candidate_trials.candidate_summary: Measure the trust health floor before trusting any risk domain or review configuration.
candidate_trials.hypothesis: Without a clear risk domain and trust signal posture, trust health cannot be assessed or improved.

candidate_trials.candidate_summary: Data privacy standard review in B2B context with green signal and preventive remediation.
candidate_trials.hypothesis: Proactive data privacy reviews in standard B2B contexts maintain green trust signals and prevent compliance drift.

candidate_trials.candidate_summary: Financial compliance deep audit in fintech regulated context with amber watch signal and corrective remediation.
candidate_trials.hypothesis: Fintech regulated ventures require deep financial compliance audits when trust signals turn amber.

candidate_trials.candidate_summary: Security posture deep audit under EU GDPR with red escalation and emergency remediation.
candidate_trials.hypothesis: Red-signal security breaches under GDPR require immediate deep audit and emergency remediation protocols.

candidate_trials.candidate_summary: Legal structure surface scan at pre-revenue light context with green signal and preventive posture.
candidate_trials.hypothesis: Pre-revenue ventures need only surface legal scans to maintain green trust while preserving build velocity.
